title: Paramètres
description: Manage your account settings, preferences, and API access.
appearanceDescriptionDesktop: Change how your dashboard looks and feels in your browser.
appearanceDescriptionMobile: How your dashboard looks in your browser.
brandColorDescription: Update your dashboard to your brand color.
displayPreferenceDescription: Switch between light and dark modes.
profileDescription: Manage your personal information and how others see you.
preferencesDescription: Customize your regional and display settings.
notificationsDescription: Choose what you want to be notified about and how often.
dailyRankingReportsHint: Receive a daily summary of your mot-clé ranking changes.
positionAlertsHint: Get alerted when mots-clés move significantly in search results.
keywordOpportunitiesHint: Be notified about new mot-clé ranking opportunities.
teamInvitationsHint: Receive notifications when you are invited to a team.
systemUpdatesHint: Stay informed about platform updates and maintenance.
apiKeysDescription: Manage API keys for programmatic access to your data.
apiKeyGeneratedBanner: Your new API key has been generated. Copy it now as it will not be shown again.
noApiKeys: Non API keys yet. Generate your first key above.
apiKeyNameRequired: Please enter a name for the API key
apiKeyScopeRequired: Please select at least one scope
brandingDescription: Upload your company logo to display on shared reports instead of the default DSE.O logo.
membersDescription: Manage who has access to your organization and their roles.
confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
limitsDescription: Control how often and how many mots-clés can be refreshed at once.
refreshCooldownHint: Minimum minutes between manual refreshes per domaine. 0 = disabled.
maxDailyRefreshesHint: Maximum manual refreshes per day for the entire organization. 0 = unlimited.
maxDailyRefreshesPerUserHint: Maximum manual refreshes per user per day. 0 = unlimited.
maxKeywordsPerBulkRefreshHint: Maximum mots-clés that can be refreshed in a single bulk action. 0 = unlimited.
rolesDescription: Manage member roles and their permissions in the organization.
deleteRoleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this role?
systemRolesDescription: Built-in roles that cannot be edited. Expand to view their permissions.
roleOwnerDescription: Full access to all settings and data. Can transfer ownership.
roleAdminDescription: Full access except changing the owner. Can manage members, roles, and all data.
roleMemberDescription: Can manage projects, domaines, mots-clés, and run analyses. Cannot manage members or organization settings.
roleViewerDescription: View-only access. Can browse all data but cannot make changes.
planDescription: View your current plan, resource usage, and available features.
planFreeHint: Upgrade for more mots-clés, domaines, and advanced features.
activeSessionsDescription: [FR] Devices currently signed in to your account.
confirmRevokeAll: [FR] Are you sure you want to revoke all other sessions? You will remain signed in on this device only.
loginHistoryDescription: [FR] Recent sign-in attempts on your account.
changePasswordDescription: [FR] We'll send a verification code to your email to confirm the change.
integrationsDescription: [FR] Connect external services to enrich your monitoring data.
gscDescription: [FR] Connect your Google Search Console to import search performance data.
gscConnectionError: [FR] Failed to connect Google Search Console
mfaDescription: [FR] Add an extra layer of security to your account with TOTP-based authentication.
mfaScanInstructions: [FR] Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
mfaBackupCodesWarning: [FR] Save these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
